name: react-dual-listbox
title: Dual Listbox
author: Jake Zatecky
description: Transfers caller-provided options between available and selected native listboxes with filtering and reordering.

files.content:
export default {
    availableFilterHeader: 'Filter available',
    availableFilterPlaceholder: 'Search...',
    availableHeader: 'Available',
    hiddenInputLabel: 'All selections',
    moveAllToAvailable: 'Move all to available',
    moveAllToSelected: 'Move all to selected',
    moveToAvailable: 'Move to available',
    moveToSelected: 'Move to selected',
    moveBottom: 'Rearrange to bottom',
    moveDown: 'Rearrange down',
    moveTop: 'Rearrange to top',
    moveUp: 'Rearrange up',
    noAvailableOptions: 'No available options',
    noSelectedOptions: 'No selected options',
    requiredError: 'Please select at least one option.',
    selectedFilterHeader: 'Filter selected',
    selectedFilterPlaceholder: 'Search...',
    selectedHeader: 'Selected',
};

import PropTypes from 'prop-types';

export default PropTypes.shape({
    availableFilterHeader: PropTypes.string,
    availableFilterPlaceholder: PropTypes.string,
    availableHeader: PropTypes.string,
    hiddenInputLabel: PropTypes.string,
    moveToAvailable: PropTypes.string,
    moveAllToAvailable: PropTypes.string,
    moveToSelected: PropTypes.string,
    moveAllToSelected: PropTypes.string,
    moveBottom: PropTypes.string,
    moveDown: PropTypes.string,
    moveTop: PropTypes.string,
    moveUp: PropTypes.string,
    noAvailableOptions: PropTypes.string,
    noSelectedOptions: PropTypes.string,
    requiredError: PropTypes.string,
    selectedFilterHeader: PropTypes.string,
    selectedFilterPlaceholder: PropTypes.string,
    selectedHeader: PropTypes.string,
});

changes: Added a React client boundary and changed the #js package import-map alias to a colocated relative import.
Changed #js package import-map aliases to relative paths so the copied closure resolves without the upstream package.json.
Changed #js package import-map aliases to relative paths so the copied closure resolves without the upstream package.json.
Changed #js package import-map aliases to relative paths so the copied closure resolves without the upstream package.json.
Changed the default iconsClass from Font Awesome 6 to the upstream native icon mode so the default has no undeclared font requirement.
Changed the #js package import-map alias to a relative path so the copied closure resolves without the upstream package.json.
Changed #js package import-map aliases to relative paths so the copied closure resolves without the upstream package.json.
Changed #js package import-map aliases to relative paths so the copied closure resolves without the upstream package.json.
Changed the #js package import-map alias to a relative path so the copied closure resolves without the upstream package.json.
Changed the #js package import-map alias to a relative path so the copied closure resolves without the upstream package.json.
Changed #js package import-map aliases to relative paths so the copied closure resolves without the upstream package.json.
Changed #js package import-map aliases to relative paths so the copied closure resolves without the upstream package.json.
Compiled the upstream SCSS to plain CSS using the upstream 6.1.0 package output and removed its inline source map.
Added max-width and min-width guards to prevent flex and select overflow at narrow widths and zoom.
Added 44 px action-button minimums and explicit focus-visible outlines.

modifications.change: Added a use client directive and changed the #js entry import to ./js/DualListBoxWrapper.jsx.
modifications.reason: Make the hook-based component a portable React client entry without copying the upstream package.json import map.

modifications.change: Changed #js imports to colocated relative imports.
modifications.reason: Resolve copied support files without the upstream package.json import map.

modifications.change: Changed #js imports to relative imports and made upstream native icons the default.
modifications.reason: Resolve the copied closure without a package import map and avoid an undeclared Font Awesome font requirement.

modifications.change: Changed the #js context import to a relative import.
modifications.reason: Resolve the copied support file without the upstream package.json import map.

modifications.change: Compiled the upstream SCSS to plain CSS, removed the inline source map, and added narrow-width, 44 px target, and focus-visible safeguards.
modifications.reason: Ship the full visual skin without a Sass build dependency while meeting portability, responsive, touch-target, and focus requirements.
